name: wakewait
description: Auto sleep and long waits for agent CLIs.

interface.shortDescription: Auto sleep and long waits for agent CLIs.
interface.longDescription: WakeWait adds local sleep, condition polling, persisted wait state, status/cancel commands, health reviews, and optional background recovery for long-running jobs.
defaultPrompt: Install WakeWait and verify it works.
Use WakeWait for a long training job.
Check and cancel persisted WakeWait tasks.
